creator: chris@chrullrich.net
text:
Hello @joneum, can you please take another look at this patch? I don't think the port works without it.

I cannot see any way that enabling HTTP_AUTH_KRB5 can result in a dependency on security/krb5 without it. All my attempts to build the port with a clean ports tree and no options other than this one failed due to a missing <gssapi/gssapi.h>.

Can you please explain how this works now? Thank you.
